book_summary: Jude has complete one-chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layer. The letter preserves fierce discernment, the common salvation, warning against grace distorted into harm, non-canonical tradition references, mercy toward doubters, careful rescue, and the closing doxology to the One able to guard from stumbling.
translation_notes: Jude's polemic targets exploitative, divisive, self-serving teachers, not ordinary disagreement or vulnerable people.
Sodom/Gomorrah and 'other flesh' require second-pass source and reception-history audit to avoid later prooftext misuse.
Jude uses traditions known from 1 Enoch and Moses-assumption/testament streams; non-canonical citation metadata required in second pass.
source_witness_audit_flags: Jude relationship to 2 Peter requires second-pass audit.
Jude 9 Michael/Moses tradition and Jude 14-15 Enoch citation require expansion-track metadata.
Jude 7 reception-history and misuse audit required.
next_actions: Batch C complete. Remaining New Testament books after this batch: Hebrews and Revelation.
